hε : ε > 0

refine (Filter.eventually_atTop.2 ⟨1, fun n hn ↦ ?_⟩)
  refine ⟨{ n := n, M := 1, L := 1, hL_pos := by decide, hL := ?_ }, rfl, ?_⟩

        (Params.initial { n := n, M := 1, L := 1, hL_pos := by decide, hL := by

    exact le_of_lt this

refine Filter.eventually_of_forall ?_
  intro n
  by_cases hn : n > 0
  · refine ⟨{ n := n, M := 1, L := 1, hL_pos := by decide, hL := by simpa using hn }, rfl, ?_⟩
    have hscore : ({ n := n, M := 1, L := 1, hL_pos := by decide, hL := by simpa using hn } : Params).initial.score 1 = 0 := by
      simp [Params.initial, Factorization.score, Factorization.waste, Factorization.sum, Factorization.total_imbalance]
    simp [hscore, hε.le, mul_nonneg, le_of_lt hε, (show (0 : ℝ) ≤ n by exact_mod_cast Nat.zero_le n)]
  · refine ⟨{ n := n, M := 1, L := 1, hL_pos := by decide, hL := by simpa using (Nat.succ_pos 0) }, rfl, ?_⟩
    have hn0 : n = 0 := by
      have : ¬ n > 0 := hn
      exact Nat.eq_zero_of_not_pos (by simpa [Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero] using this)
    subst hn0
    have hscore : ({ n := 0, M := 1, L := 1, hL_pos := by decide, hL := by decide } : Params).initial.score 1 = 0 := by
      simp [Params.initial, Factorization.score, Factorization.waste, Factorization.sum, Factorization.total_imbalance]
    simp [hscore]

  simp
